recipe.title: Superb squash soup
recipe.description: This simple butternut squash soup recipe is delicious; it's important to use good chicken stock and season the soup well to bring out the nutty flavours.

ingredients.name: butternut squash
ingredients.note: onion squash or musque de Provence

steps.descr: Peel and finely chop the onions, carrots and garlic,...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely chop the onions, carrots and garlic, then trim and finely chop the celery. Deseed and finely chop the chilli. Pick and finely chop the rosemary.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely chop the onions, carrots and garlic, then trim and finely chop the celery. Deseed and finely chop the chilli. Pick and finely chop the rosemary.

steps.descr: Heat a couple of lugs of olive oil in a large saucepan...
steps.instructions: Heat a couple of lugs of olive oil in a large saucepan over a medium heat, add the sage leaves and fry for 30 seconds, or until crisp, then remove to kitchen paper.

on_enter.say: Heat a couple of lugs of olive oil in a large saucepan over a medium heat, add the sage leaves and fry for 30 seconds, or until crisp, then remove to kitchen paper.

steps.descr: Place the pan of flavoured oil back on the heat, add the...
steps.instructions: Place the pan of flavoured oil back on the heat, add the onion, carrot, garlic, celery, chilli, rosemary and a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then cook gently for 10 minutes, or until sweet and soft.

on_enter.say: Place the pan of flavoured oil back on the heat, add the onion, carrot, garlic, celery, chilli, rosemary and a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then cook gently for 10 minutes, or until sweet and soft.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, halve, deseed and rough chop the squash
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, halve, deseed and rough chop the squash. When the time's up, add the squash and stock to the pan. Bring to the boil and simmer for 30 minutes.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, halve, deseed and rough chop the squash. When the time's up, add the squash and stock to the pan. Bring to the boil and simmer for 30 minutes.

steps.descr: For the croutons, drizzle a little olive oil over the...
steps.instructions: For the croutons, drizzle a little olive oil over the ciabatta, pat it in, then finely grate and press some grated Parmesan on to each side. Place in a dry, non-stick pan and fry until golden on both sides.

on_enter.say: For the croutons, drizzle a little olive oil over the ciabatta, pat it in, then finely grate and press some grated Parmesan on to each side. Place in a dry, non-stick pan and fry until golden on both sides.

steps.descr: When the squash is tender, whiz the soup with a stick...
steps.instructions: When the squash is tender, whiz the soup with a stick blender or pour it into a blender and pulse to a smooth purée – leave it slightly chunky, if you prefer.

on_enter.say: When the squash is tender, whiz the soup with a stick blender or pour it into a blender and pulse to a smooth purée – leave it slightly chunky, if you prefer.

steps.descr: Season to perfection with salt and pepper, then divide...
steps.instructions: Season to perfection with salt and pepper, then divide between bowls, placing 2 croutons on top of each.

on_enter.say: Season to perfection with salt and pepper, then divide between bowls, placing 2 croutons on top of each.

steps.descr: Sprinkle with a few crispy sage leaves and drizzle with...
steps.instructions: Sprinkle with a few crispy sage leaves and drizzle with a swirl of quality extra virgin olive oil, then serve.

on_enter.say: Sprinkle with a few crispy sage leaves and drizzle with a swirl of quality extra virgin olive oil, then serve.
